title: Settings
subtitle: Connect your music accounts to fetch private playlists and create Apple Music playlists.

qq.name: QQ Music
qq.description: Log in to access private playlists on y.qq.com.

netease.name: NetEase Cloud Music
netease.description: Log in to access private playlists on music.163.com.

apple.name: Apple Music
apple.description: Log in to search, match tracks, and create playlists on music.apple.com.

matching.title: Matching
matching.description: How tracks are auto-matched to Apple Music. Changes apply the next time you run or retry a match.

threshold.label: Match threshold:
threshold.help: Minimum confidence to auto-accept a match.

ambiguityGap.label: Ambiguity gap:
ambiguityGap.help: If the top two are closer than this, it needs review.

storefront.label: Storefront
storefront.help: Two-letter region, e.g. us, jp, cn. Leave blank to auto-detect.

matching.preferDuration: Prefer candidates whose duration is closest to the source track
matching.preferOriginal: Prefer original studio versions over remaster / live / karaoke
